title: Provider
description: A community-based organization (CBO) that DYCD contracts to deliver programs at one or more program sites. Canonical schema reconciling 'DYCD Contractors' (75e9-fg2t) and the Provider field carried on 'DYCD Program Sites' (ebkm-iyma) and 'DYCD Contracts' (graj-69em). DYCD is a funder/intermediary — providers are the actual service delivery layer.

awardedAmount.description: 'Amount' — funding awarded to this contractor for the program.

programAreas.description: Distinct DYCD program areas this provider operates in.

siteCount.description: Number of program sites operated by this provider.
